# PyMahjongGB integration

Install or vendor the course/Botzone-compatible `PyMahjongGB` package here for
official fan calculation and shanten helpers. `mahjong_agent.rules.RulesBackend`
detects `MahjongGB` automatically.

The repository currently includes a dependency-free fallback for development.
The fallback recognizes standard hands and seven pairs, but does not implement
the complete Chinese Official Mahjong fan table.
